title: Smoky Pumpkin Pancakes
description: A delicious and nutritious breakfast recipe that combines the flavors of pumpkin and smoky cheese. Perfect for a chilly fall morning.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the pancakes mix, milk, eggs, and honey.
Add in the pumpkin puree and mix until combined.
Melt the butter and stir it in.
If using seeds, sprinkle them on top of the batter.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
Serve warm with additional smoky cheese crumbled on top.
